op.text: Sprained ankle badly on Saturday 2025-04-13 during mile nine of a trail run in Forest Park (wet root); diagnosed as bad grade-two sprain; wore walking boot until Thursday 2025-05-01; cleared by physical therapist for light jogging (twenty minutes, flat ground, every other day) as of 2025-05-24; progressive recovery: thirty minutes by 2025-06-08, forty minutes by 2025-06-21, forty-five minutes by 2025-09-06
op.reason: Four superseded items tracking the same ankle recovery progression; can be collapsed into one item showing the full timeline without losing any specifics

op.text: Restoring mom's sailboat (the Dorothy Jean) at a barn near Scappoose; working slowly with no deadline; starboard side sanded and hull seam re-caulking started by 2025-05-11; hull caulked and painted by 2025-06-08; restoration complete (rigging done, new lines installed, marine survey completed, boat confirmed sound) by 2025-06-21; scheduled to launch weekend of 2025-07-12 at Cathedral Park ramp (Priya's dad lending truck and trailer)
op.reason: Three superseded items tracking the same restoration progression; can be collapsed into one item showing the full timeline without losing any specifics

op.text: Sam received job offer as Perception team lead at robotics startup in Austin (decision deadline early May 2025); negotiated remote work arrangement from Portland; accepted role to start June 2025 with visits to Austin approximately one week every couple months; Dana described the negotiation as 'he gave something up too — the in-person team, the new city adventure' and said she believes the trade is good for him 'about eighty-five percent'; as of 2025-05-24, Sam built out spare room as remote office (three monitors, foam panels) and was described as 'nervous-excited' before start date
